up.method: experimental specific uptake rate used as model constraint (defined as G1P production rate from starch)
experimental specific consumption during exponential phase (upper bound 0.050)
parent D852 sugar consumption rate (0.49±0.03 g/L/h; 0.52±0.03 in a fed-batch comparison)

sec.method: experimental specific production rate (1.61±0.10) used as model lower bound

growth_records.cite: Huang D et al. Genome-scale metabolic network guided engineering of Streptomyces tsukubaensis for FK506 production improvement. Microbial Cell Factories (2013). DOI:10.1186/1475-2859-12-52. [PMC3680238]
growth_records.snippet: the specific uptake rate of carbon source was defined as the production rate of glucose-1-phosphate derived from starch which was 3.472 mmol/g DCW/h... the specific growth rate was predicted to be 0.0495 h-1, consistent with the experimenta
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote (actinomycete) batch shake-flask. Experimental constraints for GSMM: mu=0.0502/h (exp), FK506 qP=1.61±0.10 umol/gDCW/h (exp), carbon-source qS defined as G1P-from-starch=3.472 mmol/gDCW/h (exp), amino-acid uptakes 0-0.050 mmol/gDCW/h (exp). Doubling time computed td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.0502=13.81 h. Titers (143.5 mg/L FK506, 21.9 FK520, 12.2 FK506D) are 6-d endpoints. Sugar consumption 0.49±0.03 g/L/h. All values verbatim from text.

up.method: experimental substrate uptake rate in fed-batch (0.44±0.02); parent D852 0.52±0.03

sec.method: experimental (2.74 fed-batch 3-L bioreactor; 2.65 for 500-mL flask batch of same strain)
HPLC endpoint fed-batch titer (1.47-fold over D852 158.7 mg/L)

growth_records.cite: Huang D et al. Genome-scale metabolic network guided engineering of Streptomyces tsukubaensis for FK506 production improvement. Microbial Cell Factories (2013). DOI:10.1186/1475-2859-12-52. [PMC3680238]
growth_records.method: not reported for this strain (biomass 8.5±0.6 g/L)
growth_records.snippet: the substrate uptake rate and biomass concentration of HT-DGDH-DAZ were 0.44 ± 0.02 g/L/h and 8.5 ± 0.6 g/L... produced 435.9 mg/L FK506 during fed-batch fermentation, 1.47-fold higher than the parent strain D852 (158.7 mg/L)... 2.65 and 2.
growth_records.notes: Engineered Streptomyces tsukubaensis, aerobic fed-batch in 3-L bioreactor. Experimental: qP(FK506)=2.74 umol/gDCW/h (fed-batch), 2.65 (flask batch); volumetric sugar uptake 0.44±0.02 g/L/h; biomass 8.5±0.6 g/L; FK506 titer 435.9 mg/L. Growth rate not reported for this strain. Values verbatim from text.
